data.body: Epic complete: all 6 stories closed, SC1-SC5 verified PASS by completion-verifier. SC6 test retargeting complete for all 11 files; pre-existing RED zone in test-project-setup-onboarding-step.sh tracked as bug 7c80-6fd7 (out of scope — Step 7 content was never part of this epic). Validation score: 5/5 for in-scope work.
